info.name: Noble
info.description: Noble background from the Player’s Handbook 2024.
info.author: Wizards of the Coast

li.i: Choose one kind of Gaming Set

ul.li: Equipment: Choose A or B: (A) Gaming Set (same as above), Fine Clothes, Perfume, 29 GP; or (B) 50 GP

description.p: You were raised in a castle, surrounded by wealth, power, and privilege. Your family of minor aristocrats ensured that you received a first-class education, some of which you appreciated and some of which you resented. Your time in the castle, especially the many hours you spent observing your family at court, also taught you a great deal about leadership.

setters.set: Strength, Intelligence, Charisma, Skilled Feat, History and Persuasion Skills, a Gaming Set

description.p: This pack contains items that are given to a character of Noble Background, if you chose option A for Equipment.
You will receive following items by extracting contents of this pack:
Note: This pack doesn't include the Gaming Set of the same kind as Proficiency gained from this Background (can be taken from "Tools" Equipment category) and 29 GP.
